# netbox_devices (Data Source)

Fetches a list of devices from Netbox.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# List all devices.
data "netbox_devices" "all" {}

# Output the name of the first device, or a message if no devices are found.
output "first_device_name" {
  value = length(data.netbox_devices.all.devices) > 0 ? data.netbox_devices.all.devices[0].name : "No devices found"
}

# Output the total number of devices found.
output "device_count" {
  value = length(data.netbox_devices.all.devices)
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `custom_field_filters` (Map of String) Filter devices by custom field values. Keys are custom field names, values are the filter values.

### Read-Only

- `devices` (Attributes List) List of devices. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--devices))
- `id` (String) Placeholder identifier for the data source.

<a id="nestedatt--devices"></a>
### Nested Schema for `devices`

Read-Only:

- `id` (Number) The ID of the device.
- `name` (String) The name of the device.
